title: ClawSafety: "Safe" LLMs, Unsafe Agents
purpose: Primary-source acquisition for queued deep review; this manifest makes no review, safety, realism, capability, or validity claim.

official_release.release_scope: The pinned snapshot contains one S2 financial workspace tarball, one S2 skill/email case file, a condensed scenario template, setup documentation, project page, license, and security guidance. It does not contain all five scenarios, all 120 cases, the full 64-turn paper-format files, paper trajectories, or aggregate result tables. README references an S2 web-case file that is absent from this pinned tree.

license.adversarial_cases: Defensive safety research subject to SECURITY.md responsible-use guidance

timing_boundary: The pinned release commit is dated 2026-04-15, eleven days after immutable arXiv v2 was updated on 2026-04-04. Treat the archive as post-v2 release evidence, not as the exact manuscript-time implementation.

paper_text_inspected: experimental setup, metrics, trial count, and sandbox description
appendix design principles, complexity requirements, and case studies
verification.extraction_status: PASS: non-empty 24-page PDF produced 91,657-byte, 1,470-line text with intact title, sections, tables, appendix, and page breaks
